title: The Bois Create Pack
description: A Create modpack with some exploraion and magic
body:
This is a modpack centerd around Create with its addons and a little bit of magic sprikeld in to the mix with Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. To make automating fun with Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks and the Create mod I have added Create: Wizardy for the custom recepis it comes with.

In addion to the magic and mechanics there is a lot of exploraion to be done with a lot of diffrent structures and bosses from varius diffrent mods togher with tectonic for some amazing landscapes


_Credits for mods from outside modrinth_

Placebo By Shadows_of_Fire

Sophisticated Backpacks and Sophisticated Core By P3pp3rF1y

Useless Sword By Furti_Two

Dimensional Trade Villagers By XanthianZ

AE2 Things [Forge] By thetechnici4n

Apotheosis and Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib) By Shadows_of_Fire

Apothic Curios by By Daripher

Bobby Reforged By Anthxny

Catalogue By MrCrayfish

Create: Broken Bad By jetpacker06

Create Confectionery By Furti_Two
